title: ficus leptocarpa var. oligosperma
intro: Ficus leptocarpa var. oligosperma, also known as the Australian banyan or small-fruited fig, is a variety of fig tree native to eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ficus leptocarpa var. oligosperma include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are used to make infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
